Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Hm? Can I help you? I don't think I've seen you here before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Hmmm... Hey, you're pretty cute.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}This club is pretty nice, huh? I come here sometimes, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Huh? Are you hitting on me? Sorry, the answer's no.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}You're not charming enough to just pick women up that easily.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Huh? Are you hitting on me? Sorry, the answer's no.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}You're a cute kid, but something's missing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}If you're serious about getting into a relationship, you need to put more effort into it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Huh? Are you hitting on me? Sorry, the answer's no.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}A guy like you must already have a girlfriend, and I'd hate to get in her way![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}What are you doing, standing there like a lump?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}You're about as charming as a rock. I bet the world is tough for someone like you, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Try being a little more charming. It's not too late for you yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}I always thought the men in this club weren't that good-looking, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}You've almost got what it takes to be my type.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}If you make just a little more effort, I'm sure you'll notice the difference.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}I always thought the men in this club weren't that good-looking, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Ahaha... I guess I was wrong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Now that it's winter, people are thinking of Christmas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}You must be having trouble, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}I bet you wish you could cancel Christmas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Now that it's winter, people are thinking of Christmas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}And in your case... Well, I shouldn't say anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Maybe it'll work out for you, maybe it won't. My fingers will be crossed for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Now that it's winter, people are thinking of Christmas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}But I bet it's no sweat for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}How many dates have you got lined up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Guys who know they're charming have no problem in life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Especially at times like this... A little charm goes a long way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}You, though... I don't know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}I hope you're relying on something besides charm, that's all I'm saying...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Guys who know they're charming have no problem in life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Especially at times like this... A little charm goes a long way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}You, though... I don't know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}You might get by okay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Guys who know they're charming have no problem in life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}Especially at times like this... A little charm goes a long way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}I'm sure you know what I mean.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 410}I'd much rather listen to you than those cultist freaks...[n]{f 1 1}
